description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three jobs: my_build_job_1 in the build stage that runs /bin/echo This is a mock build job, date > date.txt, and ls -lh date.txt, saves the generated date.txt as an artifact, and uses the docker tag. Add my_build_job_2 in the test stage that runs /bin/echo This is a mock test job and ls -lh date.txt with the docker tag. Add my_build_job_3 in the deploy stage that runs /bin/echo This is a mock deploy job and ls -lh date.txt with the docker tag. No special images, services, caches, or rules are required.
